subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ2.5
question_html:
Which of the following transitions in the hydrogen atom emits the least energy?

A. n = 2 to n = 1

B. n = 3 to n = 1

C. n = 4 to n = 2

D. n = 4 to n = 3
examiners_html: 81 % of the candidates identified the transition the emits the least energy in the given four transitions in the hydrogen atom (which was n=4 to n=3). The most commonly chosen distractor was A (n=2 to n=1) which means these candidates did not realize that the energy levels in the hydrogen atom converge at higher energy.
